items.affirmation: I am a clear and confident leader.
items.successMessage: You are leading with purpose. Feel that certainty.

items.affirmation: I make sound decisions with ease and conviction.
items.successMessage: Your judgment is sharp. Trust your instincts.

items.affirmation: I inspire my team to achieve greatness.
items.successMessage: You are a catalyst for success. Well done.

items.affirmation: I respond with patience and love.
items.successMessage: You are creating a peaceful home. Well done.

items.affirmation: I am a safe harbor for my children's feelings.
items.successMessage: Your presence is a gift. You are their rock.

items.affirmation: I find joy in the small moments of parenthood.
items.successMessage: You are present and engaged. Beautiful.

items.affirmation: I make choices that nourish my body and mind.
items.successMessage: You are honoring your body. Keep it up.

items.affirmation: I am full of energy and vitality.
items.successMessage: Feel that power surging through you. Excellent.

items.affirmation: I treat my body with respect and kindness.
items.successMessage: You are your own best caretaker. Great job.

items.affirmation: Ideas flow to me and through me effortlessly.
items.successMessage: Your channel is open. You're ready to create.

items.affirmation: I embrace my unique perspective and share it boldly.
items.successMessage: Your voice is valuable. Let it be heard.

breakIt.prompt: What loop do you want to break?

items.affirmation: I release this thought and return to the present.
items.successMessage: You broke the cycle. You are in control.

items.affirmation: Done is better than perfect. I choose action.
items.successMessage: You've chosen progress. Momentum is yours.

items.affirmation: I trust my ability to handle what comes next.
items.successMessage: You are capable and resilient. Move forward.

items.affirmation: My attention is mine to control.
items.successMessage: You chose presence over distraction. That is power.

items.affirmation: I am choosing the real world over the digital one.
items.successMessage: You are grounded in reality. Well done.

journey.affirmation: I notice when my thumb starts to wander.
journey.successMessage: Awareness is the first win. You caught it.

journey.affirmation: I pause before I pick up my phone.
journey.successMessage: That pause is where your power lives.

journey.affirmation: I am allowed to be bored sometimes.
journey.successMessage: Boredom is where ideas are born.

journey.affirmation: I put my phone down without finishing the feed.
journey.successMessage: You proved the feed doesn't own you.

journey.affirmation: I choose one real thing over the scroll.
journey.successMessage: The real world felt that.

journey.affirmation: My attention is mine and I spend it on purpose.
journey.successMessage: Spent like it matters — because it does.

journey.affirmation: One week in, I control the reflex.
journey.successMessage: Seven days of showing up. Feel that.

journey.affirmation: I start my morning without a screen.
journey.successMessage: You gave the morning back to yourself.

journey.affirmation: I leave my phone in another room when I work.
journey.successMessage: Distance creates freedom.

journey.affirmation: I scroll with intention or not at all.
journey.successMessage: Intention turns habit into choice.

journey.affirmation: I am present with the people in front of me.
journey.successMessage: They noticed. Presence shows.

journey.affirmation: I trade ten scrolled minutes for ten lived ones.
journey.successMessage: Ten minutes of real life, banked.

journey.affirmation: I end my day with a book, not a feed.
journey.successMessage: Your mind will thank you at sunrise.

journey.affirmation: Two weeks strong, my focus is coming home.
journey.successMessage: Fourteen days. The fog is lifting.

journey.affirmation: I am no longer someone who scrolls on autopilot.
journey.successMessage: That identity is yours now.

journey.affirmation: My mind creates more than it consumes.
journey.successMessage: Creator mode: engaged.

journey.affirmation: I protect my attention like it is my future.
journey.successMessage: Because it is — and you're proving it.

journey.affirmation: Stillness feels natural to me now.
journey.successMessage: You've made peace with the quiet.

journey.affirmation: I choose depth over distraction.
journey.successMessage: Deep beats shallow, every time.

journey.affirmation: My phone is a tool and I am the one holding it.
journey.successMessage: Exactly right. Tools serve you.

journey.affirmation: I am present, focused, and free.
journey.successMessage: Twenty-one days. This is who you are now.

items.affirmation: I am my own strongest ally.
items.successMessage: You are on your own side. That's a winning team.

items.affirmation: I replace self-criticism with self-compassion.
items.successMessage: You chose kindness. You deserve it.

primeMe.prompt: What moment are you preparing for?

items.affirmation: I bring clarity and calm into this conversation.
items.successMessage: You are primed and ready. Go make an impact.

items.affirmation: My contributions are valuable and insightful.
items.successMessage: You are prepared. Your voice will be heard.

items.affirmation: I am focused and ready to create value.
items.successMessage: Your mind is sharp. You're ready for a productive day.

items.affirmation: I will tackle today's challenges with energy and skill.
items.successMessage: You are capable and ready. Let's begin.

items.affirmation: I release the day and welcome restful sleep.
items.successMessage: Your mind is calm. Sweet dreams.

items.affirmation: I am grateful for today and peaceful about tomorrow.
items.successMessage: You are at peace. Rest well.

rewire.prompt: What belief are you ready to change?

items.affirmation: I am worthy of success and happiness right now.
items.successMessage: You are rewriting your story. Believe this new truth.

items.affirmation: My worth is inherent and does not need to be earned.
items.successMessage: You are enough, exactly as you are. Own it.

items.affirmation: Every experience is a lesson that helps me grow.
items.successMessage: You are embracing growth over fear. This is how you win.

items.affirmation: I choose courage over comfort.
items.successMessage: You are brave and expanding. Feel your strength.

items.affirmation: I am open and ready to receive abundance.
items.successMessage: The universe is abundant, and you are part of it.

items.affirmation: I welcome all the good things life has to offer me.
items.successMessage: You are deserving. Accept the good that comes your way.
